name: Corry
description_short: Corry FCU is a member-owned credit union offering auto loans, mortgages, student loan refinancing, and deposit accounts with rates as low as 3.99% APR on new vehicles.
description_long:
Corry Federal Credit Union (CFCU) is a not-for-profit, member-owned financial institution operating under NCUA federal insurance. The credit union serves individuals seeking alternative banking and lending options outside traditional for-profit banks, with a stated philosophy of 'People Helping People.' The organization has maintained an active online and physical presence with multiple branch locations and digital banking platforms.

CFCU offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial products including auto lending (new and used vehicles), mortgage financing, student loan refinancing, personal loans, and various deposit accounts (savings, money market, CDs, club accounts). They promote competitive auto rates as low as 3.99% APR for new vehicles and 4.24% for used vehicles, along with mortgage rates starting at 6.00% APR. Special promotions include student loan refinancing with three months of payment deferral plus $300 cash incentives, and rate matching on transferred auto loans from other lenders. The credit union also provides digital banking tools including mobile apps, online banking, bill pay, and an ATM locator.

What distinguishes CFCU is its member-ownership structure, federal NCUA insurance, and emphasis on community engagement including financial counseling services, VITA tax assistance, and financial literacy programs for teachers. The institution actively promotes member loyalty through membership appreciation initiatives and has integrated financial wellness tools like free credit score access and credit calculators. Their auto-buying center allows members to shop for vehicles online, and they offer specialized services like Health Savings Accounts and overdraft coverage options.

As a credit union, CFCU serves members who prioritize community-focused lending and non-profit financial institutions. However, membership eligibility requirements apply to most products, and membership qualification criteria are not detailed on the homepage. Their rates, while promoted as competitive, may require credit qualification and are subject to change. The organization appears regionally focused with emphasis on branch locations, though the specific service territory is not explicitly stated on the homepage.
services: New and used auto loans (3.99%-4.24% APR)
Student loan refinancing with rate incentives
Personal and business loans with online application
Deposit accounts (savings, money market, CDs, club accounts)
Financial counseling and VITA tax assistance
Free credit score access and financial calculators
ATM locator and branch locator tools
Overdraft coverage options and skip-a-pay services
pros: Competitive auto loan rates as low as 3.99% APR for new vehicles and 4.24% for used vehicles
Student loan refinancing with three months payment deferral plus $300 cash incentive
Rate-matching program for auto loans transferred from other lenders
NCUA federal insurance on all deposit accounts up to $250,000
Free financial counseling and VITA tax assistance services for members
Mobile and online banking available 24/7 with full account management features
Membership appreciation programs and community donation initiatives
cons: Membership eligibility requirements not clearly defined on website; most products require membership qualification
Specific service territory and branch locations not listed on homepage, limiting transparency on geographic availability
Mortgage rates (6.00% APR) appear relatively high compared to current market conditions as of the stated rate date (04/14/2026)
Limited information about minimum deposit requirements, credit score thresholds, or loan approval criteria
Website does not display specific membership fees or account maintenance costs
best_for: Individuals seeking auto financing with competitive rates and loan rate matching options
Student loan borrowers looking to refinance with temporary payment relief and cash incentives
Members prioritizing non-profit, community-focused banking over for-profit institutions
Homebuyers in CFCU's service territory seeking mortgage financing with federal insurance backing
diagnosis: Corry FCU is best for individuals eligible for membership seeking competitive auto loans, mortgage financing, and student loan refinancing through a member-owned credit union with federal NCUA insurance. The primary caveat is that membership eligibility requirements apply and are not transparently detailed online, requiring potential members to contact the credit union directly to confirm qualification before applying for products.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
